Home → Discography → Evolution of Elevation: The Originals

Evolution of Elevation: The Originals

2007 · BizzyBone.us

A limited-edition re-release of Evolution of Elevation (2006) featuring the original unaltered versions of the tracks, before Mob Life Records modified the production. The record also features a couple of tracks not included on the earlier edition, including solo cuts from 7th Sign affiliates. A very small pressing making it one of the rarest items in Bizzy Bone's catalog. A must-have for hardcore collectors.

"Oooh they don´t knwow, Listen to the shotgun go blow!"

— They Don´t Know
01 Intro produced by Hella Tight —
02 The Truth produced by Hella Tight —
03 To The Top produced by Hella Tight —
04 Know All About You produced by Hella Tight —
05 They Don't Know produced by Hella Tight —
06 Interlude produced by Hella Tight —
07 Evolution Of Elevation produced by Hella Tight —
08 Seventh Sensory produced by Hella Tight feat. 7th Sign Regime —
09 Bye Bye produced by Hella Tight —
10 Streets on Fire produced by Hella Tight feat. 7th Sign Regime —
11 Mr. Coke Man produced by Hella Tight —
12 A Thugs Prayer produced by Hella Tight —
13 You Don't Really Wanna Be Me produced by Hella Tight feat. Aeileon El Niño —
14 Distant Memories produced by Hella Tight —
15 Water produced by Hella Tight feat. Aeileon El Niño —
16 Know All About You (Reprise/Alternativ version) produced by Hella Tight —
17 Outro produced by Hella Tight —
